description: Letter in Arabic script, evidently from a muqṭaʿ to a patron ('al-ḥaḍra al-sāmiyya al-ajalliyya..."). Recto consists mostly of formulaic blessings. Mentions wheat granary (makhzan qamḥ) in the margin. On verso there is a note (of gratitude?) concerning the iqṭāʿ and the sultān/government and the sender and his two brothers. Needs examination.
